title: senecio puberulus
intro: Senecio puberulus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Senecio puberulus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
